data.title: FutureFuel Expands Board, Appoints Pamela R. Butcher
data.description:
Futurefuel ( (FF) ) has issued an update.

On April 3, 2025, FutureFuel Corp. announced the expansion of its Board of Directors to nine members and the appointment of Pamela R. Butcher as a Class C member. Ms. Butcher brings extensive experience in business management and marketing within the chemical industry, having served on multiple boards and held executive roles at prominent companies. Her appointment is expected to enhance FutureFuel’s strategic direction and industry positioning, with her compensation aligned with the company’s director arrangements and an option to purchase 10,000 shares of common stock.

More about Futurefuel

FutureFuel is a leading manufacturer of diversified chemical products, specialty chemical products, and biofuel products. In its chemicals business, FutureFuel manufactures specialty chemicals for specific customers (‘custom chemicals’), as well as multi-customer specialty chemicals (‘performance chemicals’). FutureFuel’s custom chemicals product portfolio includes proprietary intermediates for major chemical companies and chlorinated polyolefin adhesion promoters and antioxidant precursors for a major chemical company. FutureFuel’s performance chemicals product portfolio includes polymer (nylon) modifiers and several small-volume specialty chemicals for diverse applications. FutureFuel’s biofuels segment primarily produces and sells biodiesel.

Average Trading Volume: 277,052

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $171.7M

data.title: Tourism Holdings Limited Monitors U.S. Tariff Impact on RV Industry
data.description:
Tourism Holdings Limited ( (AU:THL) ) has shared an update.

Tourism Holdings Limited (thl) is closely monitoring the potential impacts of new tariffs announced by the United States on the North American RV industry. The company has observed a decline in consumer sentiment for inbound travel to the U.S., leading to a slowdown in international booking intakes for the peak season. While domestic bookings, which constitute around 50% of thl’s U.S. rentals, have shorter lead times, it is still uncertain if the current slowdown will affect the high season performance. thl plans to provide more detailed earnings guidance for FY25 in the fourth quarter once there is more clarity on vehicle sales and other variables.

More about Tourism Holdings Limited

Tourism Holdings Limited (thl) is a global tourism operator and the largest commercial RV rental operator in the world. It is listed on the NZX and ASX and operates various rental, manufacturing, and retail brands across New Zealand, Australia, North America, the UK, and Europe. The company also engages in travel technology and tourism attractions.

Average Trading Volume: 22,898

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

data.title: Pryme B.V. Resumes Production and Seeks Additional Funding Amid Operational Challenges
data.description:
An announcement from Pryme B.V. ( (DE:8XG0) ) is now available.

Pryme B.V. has resumed operations at its pilot plant, Pryme One, following a shutdown due to a reactor seal leak. The company is currently facing challenges with production capacity and cash flow, necessitating additional funding of around €7 million to maintain operations and meet its financial obligations. Despite these hurdles, Pryme remains optimistic about securing the necessary funding from its shareholders and sector investors. The company is also renegotiating its main sales contract to align with higher market prices for pyrolysis oil, which could improve its financial outlook.

More about Pryme B.V.

Pryme B.V. operates in the energy sector, focusing on the production of pyrolysis oil through its pilot plant, Pryme One. The company is involved in the development and scaling of sustainable energy solutions, with a market focus on increasing production capacity and efficiency.

data.title: Emeren Group CEO Transition and Financial Update
data.description:
Emeren Group ( (SOL) ) has issued an announcement.

Emeren Group Ltd announced the resignation of CEO Yumin Liu, effective April 30, 2025, with Julia Xu stepping in as Interim CEO from May 1, 2025. The company is searching for a new CEO while Xu, a seasoned financial expert and former CFO of Emeren, will guide the company through this transition. Additionally, Emeren’s Board has formed a Special Committee to evaluate a going-private proposal received on March 17, 2025. The company also released preliminary Q1 2025 results, expecting revenue of approximately $8.4 million, a gross margin of 32%, and a non-GAAP operating loss of about $4 million, with final results anticipated in mid-May.

More about Emeren Group

Emeren Group Ltd, listed on the NYSE under the ticker SOL, is a leader in renewable energy with a focus on solar projects and Independent Power Producer (IPP) assets. The company boasts a significant global Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) capacity and is involved in the entire solar project lifecycle, from development to construction and financing. Emeren leverages local talent in each market to ensure efficient and impactful sustainable energy solutions, emphasizing innovation, excellence, and environmental responsibility.

data.title: Scandium Canada Closes First Tranche of Private Placement
data.description:
Imperial Mining Group Ltd. Class A ( (TSE:SCD) ) just unveiled an update.

Scandium Canada Ltd. has announced the closing of the first tranche of its non-brokered private placement, raising $410,000 through unsecured loan agreements. The proceeds will be used primarily for administrative expenses and the development of aluminum-scandium powders. The company plans to close subsequent tranches to raise a total of $750,000, which will further support its strategic initiatives in the scandium market.

More about Imperial Mining Group Ltd. Class A

Scandium Canada Ltd. is a public company focused on becoming a leading source of scandium and advancing the development and commercialization of aluminum-scandium alloys. The company aims to meet the demand for high-performance materials through its Al-Sc alloy development subsidiary and the Crater Lake mining project, with a commitment to innovation and sustainable economic practices.

data.title: HomeStreet Announces Merger with Mechanics Bank
data.description:
HomeStreet ( (HMST) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On March 28, 2025, HomeStreet, Inc. and Mechanics Bank entered into a merger agreement for an all-stock business combination, with HomeStreet Bank merging into Mechanics Bank, which will become a wholly-owned subsidiary of HomeStreet. The merger, unanimously approved by both boards, will result in HomeStreet being renamed Mechanics Bancorp and remaining publicly traded. The merger agreement outlines the exchange ratios for both voting and non-voting common stock and includes provisions for governance, equity awards, and termination rights. The merger is subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals, with a termination fee of $10 million payable by HomeStreet under certain conditions. Additionally, a consulting agreement with HomeStreet’s CEO, Mark Mason, will take effect post-merger, and certain executives are expected to terminate their employment following the merger.

More about HomeStreet

HomeStreet, Inc. is a Washington-based corporation operating in the banking industry, with HomeStreet Bank as its wholly owned subsidiary. The company focuses on commercial banking services and is publicly traded.

data.title: Viridian Metals Secures $225K Grant to Boost Exploration in Labrador
data.description:
Viridian Metals Inc ( (TSE:VRDN) ) has issued an announcement.

Viridian Metals Inc. has received a $225,000 grant from the Junior Exploration Assistance program to support its 2024 fieldwork at the Kraken Project in Labrador. This funding, which follows a similar grant in 2023, is part of the company’s strategy to advance early-stage discoveries and is expected to drive exploration in underexplored areas, supporting regional economic development and creating opportunities for local communities. The grant highlights Labrador’s attractiveness as an exploration jurisdiction and positions Viridian to unlock the region’s critical metals potential.

More about Viridian Metals Inc

Viridian Metals Inc. is a leader in generative metal exploration with a focus on environmental responsibility and ethical practices. The company is committed to contributing to the green transition by creating sustainable value for stakeholders through responsible exploration.

data.title: New Pacific Metals Announces Executive Leadership Changes
data.description:
An announcement from New Pacific Metals ( (TSE:NUAG) ) is now available.

On March 31, 2025, New Pacific Metals announced significant executive changes, with Andrew Williams stepping down as CEO and Director effective April 15. Jalen Yuan, the current CFO, will serve as interim CEO, while Chester Xie will take over as interim CFO. The company emphasized continuity and strategic focus during this transition, with a comprehensive search underway for a permanent CEO. These changes are crucial as New Pacific Metals continues to focus on maximizing value from its assets in Bolivia, particularly its Silver Sand project.

More about New Pacific Metals

New Pacific Metals is a Canadian exploration and development company focused on precious metal projects in Bolivia. The company is advancing three key projects: the flagship Silver Sand project, which has the potential to become one of the world’s largest silver mines, the high-margin silver-lead-zinc Carangas project, and the Silverstrike project, where a discovery drill program was completed in 2022.
